title: Club la Mabbu la Lyrics Hip Hop Tamizha
stanzas: <div>Club la Mabbu la Lyrics Hip Hop Tamizha

Club la mabbu la
thiriyira pombala
ennadi nadakkuthu
senthamizh naattula

ladies, ellorukkum
vanakkamunga
ladies, maanam
parakkudhunga

thiriyira pombala
ennadi nadakkuthu
senthamizh naattula

ladies, ellorukkum
vanakkamunga
ladies, maanam
parakkudhunga

Hi girls
how are you da?
paththu maasam

moonre sorkkal

hey seena leena
veena meena
konjam konjam
gapu theriyum
vetti sceanu venaam

thamizh naattai
vittuputtu foriegnukku

thaimozhinu marandhida
venaam.

rohini mogini
yaamini kaamini
figurenu nenachitu
seyyiradhu kaamadi.

aambaliya thappu sollum
vetti vela venaandi
(avan ennathan paakkuran)
indha polappu unakaenadi

[Club la mabbu la

ennadi nadakkuthu
senthamizh naattula

parakkudhunga] (2)

ellaa ponnungalaiyum

ellaa pasangalum ippo
enga pakkam vaanga
ungalaiyum serthu
keduthuduvaanga

noorula ambathu
ippadithaan alaiyudhu
clubula mabbula
dhum adichi thiriyudhu

kan jaada kaattura
kaalam ellaam maari
kanjaa adikkudhunga
ayyo kanraavi

Club la mabbu la
thiriyira pombala
ennadi nadakkuthu
senthamizh naattula

vanakkamunga
ladies, maanam
parakkudhunga

azhagaana ponuthaan

oru bottle rummu thaan

azhagaana ponuthaan
adhukaetha kannuthaan
rum kooda irukkuthu
arai pocket dhammu thaan

dhevathaiye nee thaevayilla
aaduriye semma bothaiyile
nagaiya poata kaalam poyi
pogaiya pottu thalluthunga

kaanji patta vittu puttu
kerchief-a kattuthunga
kerchief-a kattuthunga

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Club la Mabbu la celebrates the lively atmosphere of clubs and the joy of dancing, emphasizing the fun and excitement of nightlife.

Is there a movie associated with this song?

The song is not associated with any specific movie, as it is part of an album by Hip Hop Tamizha.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by Hip Hop Tamizha, known for their energetic and catchy music.

When was the song released?

Club la Mabbu la was released on August 26, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Club la Mabbu la is a vibrant celebration of nightlife, inviting listeners to embrace the joy of dancing and partying. With its upbeat tempo and energetic lyrics, it evokes feelings of happiness and excitement, making it perfect for celebrations and gatherings. The lively atmosphere depicted in the song resonates with the spirit of Tamil Nadu's club culture. Overall, it conveys a sense of freedom and enjoyment, encouraging everyone to let loose and have fun.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Club la Mabbu la by Hip Hop Tamizha is an electrifying anthem that perfectly captures the vibrant nightlife of Tamil Nadu. With its catchy beats and lively lyrics, this song invites everyone to let loose and enjoy the moment. Experience the unique blend of Hip Hop Tamizha's signature style that makes this track a must-listen for party lovers!
